role: A full-screen modal region that displays a selected node's resolved output and metadata.
capabilities: Conditionally render full-screen workshop modal from app context state
Display node type, node ID, and address in a kit SectionHead
Render the full resolved output inside a kit Surface
Close the modal via a click handler
substance_why: It implements a complete, conditional modal view with real data bindings to workshop.nodeType, nodeId, address, and output, plus a working close interaction.
interactions_present: Click the ✕ close button to dismiss the modal
interactions_missing: No Escape key handler to close modal
No focus trap or aria modal accessibility
No copy or export of the output text
performance_risks: Raw workshop.output is injected into DOM without size limits or virtualization
Component re-renders whenever app context updates, with no memoization
reuse_why: The file already adopted the shared kit vocabulary and preserves the correct data contract, so it should be adapted rather than replaced.
decomposition_hints: Extract a reusable modal chrome/shell (fixed overlay + close button) from the bespoke .workshop layout
Separate output rendering into its own component to handle sanitization, scrolling, and large content
Move modal open/close behavior and focus/keyboard handling into a shared modal hook or component
